requirement_topic.en: EMC — Household Refrigerating Appliances (QGOSM + GSO-adopted CISPR/IEC EMC standards)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（QGOSM + GSO采用的CISPR/IEC电磁兼容标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（QGOSM + GSO採用的CISPR/IEC電磁相容標準）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Qatar market must meet the electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) requirements administered by QGOSM under the GSO framework. GSO adopts the CISPR/IEC family of EMC standards for household appliances: the emission requirements derive from GSO CISPR 14-1 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission) and the immunity requirements from GSO CISPR 14-2 (Part 2: Immunity). These cover conducted and radiated disturbance limits relevant to motor-driven and inverter-driven compressors, plus harmonic current emissions (GSO IEC 61000-3-2) and voltage fluctuation/flicker (GSO IEC 61000-3-3) where applicable. EMC conformity is demonstrated within the QGOSM conformity assessment / product registration, typically via a test report from a recognised laboratory referencing the GSO-adopted CISPR/IEC standards. Radio-enabled (smart) appliances additionally fall under the Communications Regulatory Authority (CRA) type-approval regime, separate from QGOSM.
summary.zh: 投放卡塔尔市场的家用制冷器具须满足QGOSM在GSO框架下管理的电磁兼容（EMC）要求。GSO采用CISPR/IEC系列家用器具电磁兼容标准：发射要求源自GSO CISPR 14-1（电磁兼容——家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的要求——第1部分：发射），抗扰度要求源自GSO CISPR 14-2（第2部分：抗扰度）。上述标准涵盖与电动机驱动及变频压缩机相关的传导与辐射骚扰限值，以及适用情况下的谐波电流发射（GSO IEC 61000-3-2）和电压波动/闪烁（GSO IEC 61000-3-3）。EMC合格性在QGOSM合格评定/产品注册中证明，通常通过认可实验室出具的、引用GSO采用的CISPR/IEC标准的检测报告。具备无线功能的（智能）器具另须受通信监管局（CRA）的型号核准制度约束，与QGOSM分立。
summary.zht: 投放卡塔爾市場的家用製冷器具須滿足QGOSM在GSO框架下管理的電磁相容（EMC）要求。GSO採用CISPR/IEC系列家用器具電磁相容標準：發射要求源自GSO CISPR 14-1（電磁相容——家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的要求——第1部分：發射），抗擾度要求源自GSO CISPR 14-2（第2部分：抗擾度）。上述標準涵蓋與電動機驅動及變頻壓縮機相關的傳導與輻射騷擾限值，以及適用情況下的諧波電流發射（GSO IEC 61000-3-2）和電壓波動/閃爍（GSO IEC 61000-3-3）。EMC合格性在QGOSM合格評定/產品註冊中證明，通常通過認可實驗室出具的、引用GSO採用的CISPR/IEC標準的檢測報告。具備無線功能的（智能）器具另須受通信監管局（CRA）的型號核准制度約束，與QGOSM分立。

standards_or_laws: GSO CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (GSO adoption of CISPR 14-1)
GSO CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (GSO adoption of CISPR 14-2)
GSO IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (input current ≤ 16 A/phase) — supplementary where applicable
GSO IEC 61000-3-3 — Voltage fluctuations and flicker — supplementary where applicable
Communications Regulatory Authority (CRA) Qatar — type approval for radio-enabled appliances (separate from QGOSM)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). For harmonic emissions, GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) applies. These are enforced under the CCC regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Test reports generated by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories against GB 4343.1 are not directly accepted by QGOSM as the basis for Qatar conformity; conformity to the GSO-adopted CISPR/IEC EMC standards must be demonstrated.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）。谐波发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）适用。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC制度下执行。CNAS认可的中国实验室依据GB 4343.1出具的检测报告不被QGOSM直接接受作为卡塔尔合格评定的依据；须证明符合GSO采用的CISPR/IEC电磁兼容标准。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）。諧波發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）適用。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC制度下執行。CNAS認可的中國實驗室依據GB 4343.1出具的檢測報告不被QGOSM直接接受作為卡塔爾合格評定的依據；須證明符合GSO採用的CISPR/IEC電磁相容標準。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions ≤ 16 A/phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: Because both Chinese GB 4343.1 and the GSO-adopted GSO CISPR 14-1 derive from CISPR 14-1, the technical content gap may be limited for many refrigerator types. However, procedural gaps remain: (1) Conformity route — QGOSM requires EMC evidence referencing the GSO-adopted CISPR/IEC standards within a Qatar-recognised conformity assessment; a CCC EMC report referencing GB 4343.1 does not substitute without re-issuance, although a test report from an ILAC MRA-member laboratory covering CISPR 14-1/14-2 may be accepted. (2) Edition alignment — the GSO CISPR 14-1 edition adopted by Qatar may be more recent than the CISPR 14-1:2016 basis of GB 4343.1-2018; inverter/variable-speed compressor models in particular should be checked for coverage of the latest emission test configurations. (3) Radio modules — smart refrigerators with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth require separate CRA type approval that has no Chinese equivalent within CCC.
gap.zh: 由于中国GB 4343.1和GSO采用的GSO CISPR 14-1均源自CISPR 14-1，对许多电冰箱类型而言技术内容差距可能有限。但仍存在程序性差距：（1）合格路径——QGOSM要求在卡塔尔认可的合格评定中提供引用GSO采用的CISPR/IEC标准的电磁兼容证据；引用GB 4343.1的CCC电磁兼容报告未经重新签发不能替代，但ILAC MRA成员实验室出具的、涵盖CISPR 14-1/14-2的检测报告可能被接受。（2）版本一致性——卡塔尔采用的GSO CISPR 14-1版本可能比GB 4343.1-2018所依据的CISPR 14-1:2016更新；变频/变速压缩机型号尤应核查是否涵盖最新发射测试配置。（3）无线模块——带Wi-Fi/蓝牙的智能电冰箱须另行取得CRA型号核准，此在中国CCC体系内无对应规定。
gap.zht: 由於中國GB 4343.1和GSO採用的GSO CISPR 14-1均源自CISPR 14-1，對許多電冰箱類型而言技術內容差距可能有限。但仍存在程序性差距：（1）合格路徑——QGOSM要求在卡塔爾認可的合格評定中提供引用GSO採用的CISPR/IEC標準的電磁相容證據；引用GB 4343.1的CCC電磁相容報告未經重新簽發不能替代，但ILAC MRA成員實驗室出具的、涵蓋CISPR 14-1/14-2的檢測報告可能被接受。（2）版本一致性——卡塔爾採用的GSO CISPR 14-1版本可能比GB 4343.1-2018所依據的CISPR 14-1:2016更新；變頻/變速壓縮機型號尤應核查是否涵蓋最新發射測試配置。（3）無線模組——帶Wi-Fi/藍牙的智能電冰箱須另行取得CRA型號核准，此在中國CCC體系內無對應規定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for QGOSM conformity — EMC evidence referencing GSO-adopted CISPR 14-1/14-2 (and IEC 61000-3-2/3-3 where applicable) is required within the Qatar conformity assessment; radio-enabled models also require separate CRA type approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) / Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology (QGOSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC conformity to the GSO-adopted CISPR 14-1/14-2 standards via QGOSM is mandatory for household refrigerators in Qatar. Chinese CCC EMC test data (GB 4343.1-2018) cannot be directly used; a conformity assessment referencing the GSO-adopted CISPR/IEC standards is required, and ILAC MRA-member laboratory reports may be acceptable. Smart/radio-enabled models additionally require Qatar CRA type approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 通过QGOSM按GSO采用的CISPR 14-1/14-2标准进行电磁兼容合格评定是家用电冰箱在卡塔尔的强制要求。中国CCC电磁兼容检测数据（GB 4343.1-2018）不能直接使用；须进行引用GSO采用的CISPR/IEC标准的合格评定，ILAC MRA成员实验室报告可能被接受。智能/无线型号另须取得卡塔尔CRA型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 通過QGOSM按GSO採用的CISPR 14-1/14-2標準進行電磁相容合格評定是家用電冰箱在卡塔爾的強制要求。中國CCC電磁相容檢測數據（GB 4343.1-2018）不能直接使用；須進行引用GSO採用的CISPR/IEC標準的合格評定，ILAC MRA成員實驗室報告可能被接受。智能/無線型號另須取得卡塔爾CRA型號核准。
